caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking, as indicated by the visual elements and the speaker's discussion. The screen displays a complex diagram with various interconnected nodes and labels, suggesting a focus on understanding relationships and processes within a system. The central part of the diagram includes terms like "COAST," "CSM," and "CSSB," which might represent different components or stages within the system being discussed. The speaker, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and actively engaging with the audience. The background shows a cluttered room with various items, indicating a casual or home office setting. The overall content seems educational, aimed at explaining the intricacies of systems thinking and its applications.
